generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Standard cycloidal gearbox reducing motor speed and increasing torque output"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly mounted encoder on the motor shaft measuring motor rotational position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring gearwheel rotational position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Input current sensor from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller measuring motor phase currents"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentData, MotorAngleData, GearboxAngleData
    base:desc "Calculated from motor constants and encoder readings via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D"
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorAngleData, GearboxAngleData
    base:desc "Derived from angular position measurements with velocity calculation"
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics for motor-gearbox system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Stribeck friction behavior with temperature dependency"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing LuGre friction dynamics with hysteresis effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Dahl friction characteristics for gearbox components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box data-driven friction model trained on real operational data for adaptive compensation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance SystemDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model implementing complete system dynamics including all friction components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance IdealBehaviorReference : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reference model representing ideal friction-free behavior for torque/velocity comparison"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance FrictionAffectedBehavior : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulated behavior with friction models applied for comparison with measured data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque measurement from motor current and position (τ_M) for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisDashboard
]

instance MeasuredGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque measurement from gearbox position (τ_G) for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisDashboard
]

instance MeasuredSystemTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived output torque measurement (τ_out) for motion accuracy assessment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisDashboard
]

instance MeasuredMotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity from motor encoder (ω_M) for control validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlAlgorithmOptimizationService
]

instance MeasuredGearboxVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity from gearbox encoder (ω_G) for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisDashboard
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque output (τ̂r_M) with friction models subtracted for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemDynamicsModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionComparisonDashboard
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox torque output (τ̂r_G) with friction models subtracted for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemDynamicsModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionComparisonDashboard
]

instance SimulatedSystemTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output torque (τ̂r_out) with friction models subtracted for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemDynamicsModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionComparisonDashboard
]

instance FrictionModelMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata tracking model version, training parameters, and operational conditions for model traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DynamicModelUpdateData
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MathWorksSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink environment for executable friction models and system dynamics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelingService, ControlSimulationService
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UML class diagram defining purpose-driven data traces, data points, sources, and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceManagementService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance DynamicModelUpdateSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time system for dynamic exchange of white-box/black-box friction models during operation"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveModelingService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionCharacterizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box/black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionStaticInsight, FrictionKineticInsight, FrictionViscousInsight
]

instance ControlAlgorithmOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive friction compensation to reduce motion inaccuracies (30% reduction via digital shadow)"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance FrictionAnalysisDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard for comparison of measured vs. simulated data to detect anomalies (wear, misalignment)"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight, MaintenanceTriggerAction
]

instance FrictionModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executable simulation of friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre, Dahl) and system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance FrictionComparisonDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of torque/velocity comparisons between measured and simulated friction-affected behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehaviorComparisonInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time system for dynamic model updates during operation to adapt to wear, load, or temperature changes"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveCompensationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionStaticInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static friction characteristics in the gearbox system"
]

instance FrictionKineticInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of kinetic friction components affecting motion accuracy"
]

instance FrictionViscousInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of viscous friction characteristics in the drive train"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adaptive friction compensation reducing motion inaccuracies by 30% via digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of wear, misalignment, or other anomalies via measured vs. simulated data comparison"
]

instance MaintenanceTriggerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic maintenance action triggered when anomalies exceed predefined thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BehaviorComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comparison between measured friction-affected behavior and ideal simulated behavior"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of friction models against real operational data for accuracy assessment"
]

instance AdaptiveCompensationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of control algorithms based on real-time friction model updates"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environment
instance RobotMotionEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, GearboxActuator
]

instance IndustrialMachiningEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotMotionEnvironment
    base:desc "Critical motion control environment for precision machining applications"
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel,
        LuGreFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, BlackBoxFrictionModel,
        SystemDynamicsModel, IdealBehaviorReference, FrictionAffectedBehavior,
        MeasuredMotorTorqueData, MeasuredGearboxTorqueData, MeasuredSystemTorqueData,
        MeasuredMotorVelocityData, MeasuredGearboxVelocityData,
        SimulatedMotorTorqueData, SimulatedGearboxTorqueData, SimulatedSystemTorqueData,
        FrictionModelMetadata, MathWorksSimulink, DigitalShadowReferenceModel,
        MQTTProtocol, DynamicModelUpdateSystem,
        FrictionCharacterizationService, ControlAlgorithmOptimizationService,
        FrictionAnalysisDashboard, FrictionModelingService, FrictionComparisonDashboard,
        AdaptiveControlSystem,
        FrictionStaticInsight, FrictionKineticInsight, FrictionViscousInsight,
        MotionAccuracyImprovementAction, AnomalyDetectionInsight, MaintenanceTriggerAction,
        BehaviorComparisonInsight, ModelValidationInsight, AdaptiveCompensationAction
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time (low-latency)**, with:
  - **Data acquisition frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., encoders, current) streamed via **MQTT** at operational rates (e.g., per millisecond or second, depending on robot control demands).
  - **Model updates**: Continuous refinement of friction models during operation to account for **wear, load variations, and temperature effects**.
  - **Synchronization**: Live data integration with simulation models (e.g., Simulink) for **multi-physics-aware friction analysis** with sub-second latency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is **single-axis focused** for the MABI MAX 100 robot’s first axis, comprising:
  - **Physical Twin (PT)**: The robot’s first axis (motor, gearbox, cycloidal gearbox) with embedded sensors (encoders, current).
  - **Digital Shadow (DS)**: A **real-time, data-driven representation** of joint friction behavior, integrating:
    - **Engineering models** (SysML),
    - **Simulation models** (Simulink),
    - **Data traces** (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out, ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out),
    - **Processing components** (Simulation M, GW, GB) for friction model updates.
  - **Dashboard**: Unified visualization of measured vs. simulated data for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across:
  - **As-designed stage**: Structural SysML models define the robot’s first axis architecture (motor, gearbox, cycloidal gearbox).
  - **As-operated stage**: Real-time friction modeling and control during **machining operations** (e.g., milling) to improve positional accuracy (0.06 mm repeatability, 0.1 mm positional accuracy). The digital shadow is **operational-time focused**, enabling continuous friction adaptation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification/Validation**:
    - **SysML models** (BDD/IBD) validate structural integrity of the first axis.
    - **Simulink simulations** validate friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) against real-time data.
  - **Uncertainty management**:
    - **Encoder-based torque estimation** (motor vs. gearbox encoders) reduces positional uncertainty.
    - **Live data integration** (MQTT) ensures real-time alignment between physical and digital representations.
  - **Traceability**: Metadata links data points to their sources (e.g., sensor IDs, model parameters) for accountability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection uses:
  - **MQTT protocol** for real-time sensor data streaming from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for structured data representation and interoperability with digital twin components.
  - **SysML models** (BDD/IBD) for physical system documentation.
  - **MathWorks Simulink** for executable simulation models (friction, dynamics) linked to data traces."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
  - **SysML** for structural modeling (BDD/IBD),
  - **MathWorks Simulink** for simulation models,
  - **MQTT protocol** for real-time data exchange,
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** for traceability and metadata standards (e.g., data traces, sources, models)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Real-time data integrity**: MQTT ensures low-latency, reliable streaming of sensor data.
  - **Autonomous operation**: The digital shadow is **passive** (one-way data flow) and does not autonomously act on the physical system (no virtual-to-physical feedback loops).
  - **Human-in-the-loop**: Dashboard visualization requires operator intervention for critical decisions (e.g., maintenance).
  - **No remote execution**: The system does not enable remote control of the robot, mitigating human safety risks."
]
